/opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/bin/mipsel-none-elf-gcc  -DPS1_BUILD -ffreestanding -T/opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/cmake/../ldscripts/exe.ld -nostdlib -Wl,-gc-sections -G8 -static CMakeFiles/ps1_minimal.dir/ps1_minimal_main.c.obj -o ps1_minimal.elf  -lgcc /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libpsxgpu_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libpsxgte_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libpsxspu_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libpsxcd_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libpsxpress_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libpsxsio_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libpsxetc_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libpsxapi_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libsmd_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/liblzp_exe_gprel.a /opt/psn00bsdk/PSn00bSDK-0.24-Linux/lib/libpsn00b/debug/libc_exe_gprel.a -lgcc
